description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On April 2, 2026 (Reiwa 8), a Thursday, the Spring National Traffic Safety Campaign kickoff ceremony was held at the Tawayanagi District Administrative Center, and I attended as a guest.

This ceremony was held to align the commitment of the police, local government, and traffic-related organizations toward traffic safety, build momentum for the campaign, and raise public awareness about preventing traffic accidents.

Going forward, we will work together with all relevant agencies to prevent traffic accidents.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202604/13405.html
summary: 📝 Mayor: Spring National Traffic Safety Campaign Kickoff Ceremony
